name: gridphp/gridphp-community
description: Interactive demo showcase for GridPHP. Includes pre-loaded sample datasets and production-ready CRUD grid configurations.

post-create-project-cmd:
@php -r '$win = strtoupper(substr(PHP_OS, 0, 3)) === "WIN"; $c1 = $win ? "" : "\033[1;32m"; $c2 = $win ? "" : "\033[1;34m"; $r = $win ? "" : "\033[0m"; printf("
%s🎉 GridPHP Demos Installed Successfully!%s
%sTo view all interactive demos locally, execute:

👉 php -S localhost:8000

Then open your browser and navigate to http://localhost:8000%s

", $c1, $r, $c2, $r);'
